references.text: Hansen, B. 1982. Addenda & Corridenda. Flora Malesiana series 1, 9: 571-573
Royen, P van. 1953. Xyridaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 367-376

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser & John Edward Matulina Villasis, 31 August 2024

species.citation: Thunb. , Prodr. Pl. Cap. (1794) 12 ; Hansen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1982) 573. = Xyris capensis var. schoenoides (Mart.) L.A.Nilsson , Öfvers. Kongl. Vetensk.-Akad. Förh. 24 (1892) 41 ; Royen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1953) 374; ≡ Xyris schoenoides Mart. , Pl. Asiat. Rar. 3 (1832) 30.
species.distribution: Africa, America, China, India, Indochina, Malesia, Philippines, Thailand. LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO: Bukidnon.
species.notes: Recorded in the Philippines from Mt Tabayoc (Jacobs 7436 and 7491) and Mt Limbawon (Fritsch et al. 2091), in open wet places among grasses and sphagnum, including mountain swamps and lake banks. 600-3300m.

species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 256 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 192; Royen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1953) 369.
species.distribution: Australia, China, India, Indochina, Malesia, Sri Lanka, Thailand. LUZON: Bulacan, Isabela, SEMIRARA.
species.notes: In fields and moist sandy soil in coastal areas. 0-1600m.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 42 ; Royen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1953) 373; B.Hansen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1982) 572.
species.distribution: Australia, China, India, Malesia, Myanmar, Sri Lanka, Thailand.
species.notes: In wet grasslands and inundated rice fields. 0-250(-900)m.

species.citation: Willd. , Phytographia (1794) 2 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 192; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 192; Royen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1953) 371.
species.distribution: Australia, China, Hong Kong, India, Indochina, Malesia, Myanmar, Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Thailand. LUZON: Bulacan, NCR, Rizal, Zambales, PANAY.
species.notes: In open wet places, swamps, and fields. 0-300(-900)m.
